basic_details.job_title: Allahabad University Field Investigator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The University of Allahabad has officially announced the Field Investigator Recruitment 2026 with 1 vacancy on a project-based basis. Candidates holding a Postgraduate Degree in any Social Science discipline, Home Science, Public Health Nutrition, or an interdisciplinary field with a minimum of 55% marks are eligible to apply. Selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of INR 20,000 per month. Interested and eligible candidates can submit their applications through email on or before 14 July 2026. Direct links to download the notification and application details are provided below.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate in any social science discipline/ Home Science /Public Health Nutrition/ interdisciplinary field with a minimum of 55% marks.
qualification.details: Field Investigator: Postgraduate in any social science discipline/ Home Science /Public Health Nutrition/ interdisciplinary field with a minimum of 55% marks. Previous experience in field surveys, social science research, community-based research, or public health projects. Ability to communicate effectively in Hindi and local languages. Basic computer skills, including proficiency in MS Office applications and data entry. Willingness to travel extensively in rural areas for fieldwork and project-related activities.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for University of Allahabad Field Investigator Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 14-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download University of Allahabad Field Investigator Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download University of Allahabad Field Investigator Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Field Investigator position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 14-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Field Investigator role?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Postgraduate degree in any social science discipline, Home Science, Public Health Nutrition, or an interdisciplinary field with at least 55% marks.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any experience required for this position?
faq.answer: Preference will be given to candidates with prior experience in field surveys, social science research, community-based research, or public health projects.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Field Investigator post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of INR 20,000 per month for this project-based role.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Field Investigator position?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to email their application, CV, and relevant self-attested documents to the provided email address.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Field Investigator post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Field Investigator position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What are the essential skills for a Field Investigator?
faq.answer: Effective communication in Hindi and local languages, basic computer skills (MS Office, data entry), and a willingness to travel extensively in rural areas are essential.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Field Investigator position will primarily involve an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the University of Allahabad located?
faq.answer: The University of Allahabad is located in Prayagraj, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 211002.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: This is a project-based position, meaning it is temporary and tied to the duration of the specific research project.
